trigger.stage: all four new receptors and ligands prepared; before any Vina execution

change.rationale: Increase only the z length by 2 A. This restores at least 4 A crystal-pose margin without shifting the common frame or changing x/y bounds.

revalidation_requirement: Run co-crystal redocking for all four existing and all four new receptors with the revised common box. All eight top-ranked poses must have symmetry-corrected heavy-atom RMSD at most 2 A before benchmark docking.
interpretation_boundary: The box expansion is determined only by aligned co-crystal geometry. It does not use enrichment or QUBO outcomes.
